description: CompositionRed and white checked shirt made of 100% cotton, has a narrow spread collar with a full front buttoned placket, long sleeves with buttoned cuffs and mid arm button tab, Western style yoked back and front, pocket on left chest with embroidered branding and a curved hemFitRegularWash careMachine wash using a mild detergentWash dark colours separatelyWash and dry inside outDo not bleach, do not wringFlat dry in shade or tumble dryWarm ironwrangler has been clothing the world since 1947 and they're showing no sign of slowing down – this stylish shirt has tiny checks giving you a relaxed air when you wear it. The mid arm tabs on the sleeves mean you can roll them up when the weather gets warmer, while the cotton fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Team this with jeans and leather shoes for that perfect semi-formal look.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
